name: Speedy Little Devils
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter and dry cake mix in a bowl. Let the butter cool down for a couple of minutes before adding it to the dry mix. The mixture should be crumbly; if the butter is too hot, the result will be a sticky mass rather than a crumbly mixture.
2. Reserve 1 - 1/2 cups of this mixture for topping. Pat the remaining crumb mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
3. Combine the peanut butter and marshmallow cream in a bowl and spread it evenly over the crumb mixture in the pan.
4. Crumble the reserved 1 - 1/2 cups of cake mixture over the peanut butter/marshmallow cream layer.
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
6. Let cool, cut into bars, and serve one piece at a time.
Makes 3 dozen bars.
